plugins.name: claude-code-dashboard
plugins.description: A local web dashboard for any Claude Code plugin. Chat panel backed by your real claude CLI, slash autocomplete, attachments, native folder picker, in-place editor, live event feed.

plugins.name: ka-sfskills
plugins.description: Salesforce skill library, 60+ run-time agents, slash commands, hooks, and live-org MCP server. Search the local knowledge corpus, validate designs against a real Salesforce org, and dispatch focused run-time agents.
